# Talk Page Fetcher

## What
Add `fetchTalkRevisions(pageTitle)` to `MediaWikiClient` so the ingestion layer can retrieve talk page revision history.

## Why
Talk pages contain editorial reasoning, consensus discussions, and dispute resolutions. They are the missing data source for L3 ground truth (declared in ARCHITECTURE.md lines 21-27 but not implemented).

## Context
Read first:
- `packages/ingestion/src/mediawiki-client.ts` — existing `fetchRevisions()` pattern, constructor, `RateLimiter` usage, `mapRevision()`
- `packages/ingestion/src/index.ts` — `RevisionFetcher` interface, exports
- `packages/evidence-graph/src/schemas/revision.ts` — `Revision` type shape
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` lines 21-27 — L3 description

## Implementation
1. Add `fetchTalkRevisions(pageTitle: string, options?: RevisionOptions): Promise<Revision[]>` to `MediaWikiClient`
2. Talk page titles are `Talk:{pageTitle}` on English Wikipedia. Make the namespace prefix configurable via an optional parameter: `{ talkPrefix?: string }` defaulting to `"Talk:"`.
3. Reuse the existing `fetchRevisions()` body — the API call is identical, only the page title changes. The cleanest approach: call `this.fetchRevisions(talkTitle, options)` internally.
4. Export from `packages/ingestion/src/index.ts`

## Invariants
- L1 only — no model calls
- Reuses `RateLimiter` already on the client instance
- Must respect `RevisionOptions` (limit, direction, timestamp range) same as `fetchRevisions`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Gate: `bun run build && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test`
- [ ] Write a test in `packages/ingestion/src/__tests__/talk-page.test.ts` that calls `fetchTalkRevisions("Wikipedia:About")` and asserts result is `Revision[]` with at least 1 entry
- [ ] Method exported from `packages/ingestion/src/index.ts`
- [ ] Update ROADMAP.md status for L1-01 to `done` and L1-02 to `ready`
